entryRules.primaryTrigger: Enter long when RSI(14) crosses above 35 from oversold AND price holds above $94,250.00 support level. Smart money accumulation detected — this is a contrarian entry.
entryRules.confirmation: Confirmation: Funding rate must be below 0.005% (currently fearful leverage = room for squeeze) AND exchange net outflow increasing (whales withdrawing from exchanges).

timeStop.description: Exit if no significant movement after 10 4h candles

invalidation: If Fear & Greed Index drops below 25 (currently 28), bullish thesis is invalidated.
If price closes below $91,422.50 (3% below nearest support), exit immediately.
If RSI(14) drops below 30 and MACD crosses bearish, regime has shifted.
If funding rate exceeds 0.05% (extreme greed in leverage), reduce position by 50%.
BOTTOMING divergence active: If smart money accumulation reverses (exchange inflow spikes), this signal is invalidated.
High-impact macro events detected in next 7 days. Consider reducing position size by 25% or exiting before event.

backtestParameters.benchmark: BTC total return over same period

riskFlags: ⚠️ HIGH IMPACT: US CPI Release on 2026-06-12

signals.rawValue: RSI(14): 58.7 | MACD Hist: 125.3 | Price: $96,120 vs EMA50: $94,800 | Support: $94,250 | Resistance: $103,800
signals.label: BULLISH

signals.rawValue: In Top 5 Trending: YES (Bitcoin ETF Inflows) | Top Narratives: Bitcoin ETF Inflows, AI, Layer 2
signals.label: HOT

signals.rawValue: Fear & Greed: 28 (Fear) | BTC Dom: 56.8% | Altcoin Season: 32 | Market Cap 24h: -0.80%
signals.label: FEAR

signals.rawValue: Overall: POSITIVE | Catalysts: 2 | Headlines: BlackRock BTC ETF sees record inflows | MicroStrategy adds 5K BTC | Fed hints at rate cut
signals.label: POSITIVE

divergencesDetected.description: Retail leverage is fearful (negative funding rates) while smart money is accumulating (whale buying + exchange outflows). This is a classic bottoming pattern — whales buy while retail capitulates.
